title: Fix bazel-multibuild BUILD analysis failure
description: bazel-multibuild/java/BUILD references oci_image, tar, and container_structure_test rules without loading them in MODULE.bazel. Running 'bazel test //...' from bazel-multibuild/java/ fails at analysis phase with 'name oci_image is not defined'. The portfolio claims Bazel expertise but the primary demo does not build. Fix: add rules_oci, rules_pkg, and container_structure_test deps to MODULE.bazel and add load() statements in BUILD, or remove container targets until deps are wired.

title: Fix online-bookstore FastAPI import error
description: online-bookstore/src/main.py line 1 imports FastAPI from fastapi.responses, which does not export it. This causes a collection error in pytest and prevents the app from starting. The project is listed as 'stable' in portfolio.yaml. Fix: change import to 'from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Depends, WebSocket' and 'from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse'. Then verify all tests pass: cd online-bookstore && pytest.

title: Remove committed virtualenv and bytecode from git
description: projgen/.venv/ (2,010 tracked files), __pycache__ in online-bookstore, otel-demo-stack, platform-audit-template, and .pytest_cache in ci-cd-pipelines and dev-env are all tracked in git. This bloats clones, creates noisy diffs, and risks accidentally committing secrets if they land in .venv paths. Fix: git rm -r --cached on all artifact paths, add Python/venv/cache entries to root .gitignore, and optionally add a pre-commit check to prevent re-commit.

title: Add Gradle build files to kotlin-custom-detekt-rules-library
description: c0de-quality-and-analysis/kotlin-custom-detekt-rules-library has a CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml) that runs './gradlew test detekt', but the subproject has no build.gradle, settings.gradle, or gradlew. The rules source and tests exist but cannot be compiled or run. This blocks demonstrating custom static analysis plugin competency. Fix: add Gradle Kotlin DSL project with detekt plugin, gradlew wrapper, and CustomRuleSetProvider service registration.

title: Add gradlew wrapper and repositories block to onboarding-automation-cli
description: dev-env/onboarding-automation-cli/build.gradle.kts declares plugins and the application block but has no repositories { mavenCentral() } block and no gradlew wrapper. Running 'gradle test' fails: 'Cannot resolve external dependency org.jetbrains.kotlin:kotlin-stdlib:1.9.24 because no repositories are defined.' Fix: add repositories block to build.gradle.kts and generate gradlew wrapper via 'gradle wrapper'.

title: Fix root CI mypy — fails on duplicate conftest module names
description: CI runs 'mypy .' from repo root. It fails immediately due to duplicate conftest module names across ai-best-practices-examples/ai-code-assistant/tests/conftest.py and ai-best-practices-examples/ai-image-video-generator/tests/conftest.py. Fix: run per-package mypy with --explicit-package-bases, or exclude tests/ directories from root mypy config.

title: Replace yourusername badge placeholder URLs in README.md
description: README.md lines 3-5 contain badge URLs with https://github.com/yourusername/portfolio-projects/... as the repository path. These badges (CI/Release/CodeQL) are broken on every page view. Fix: replace yourusername with the actual GitHub username/org in all badge URLs.

title: Fix root CI pytest — 36 collection errors across monorepo
description: CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml) runs 'pytest -q --cov=.' from repo root, producing 70 passed but 36 errors (import/path collisions). Failures come from: online-bookstore broken import, ci-cd-pipelines path collisions, rest-api-test-demo ImportPathMismatchError, workflow-api-demo and otel-demo-stack path issues. Fix: switch to per-project pytest in a matrix job, add pytest.ini with testpaths isolation, or use tox/nox orchestration — never collect all tests/ trees simultaneously.

title: Expand portfolio.yaml to index all 48 subprojects
description: portfolio.yaml and the auto-generated README table list only 5-6 of ~48 subprojects across 6 suites (ai-best-practices-examples, ci-cd-pipelines, c0de-quality-and-analysis, dev-env, dev-ex, and others). Recruiters and contributors cannot navigate the repo without reading every area README. Fix: extend portfolio.yaml with suite groupings or per-subproject entries for all areas, run scripts/gen_readme_table.py, and update mkdocs.yml nav to include new suites.

title: Populate empty pyproject.toml stubs in dev-env suite
description: dev-env/environment-drift-detector/pyproject.toml and dev-env/remote-dev-environment-orchestrator/pyproject.toml are empty files (0 bytes). Source code exists but the packages are not installable. Running pytest reports 'no tests ran'. Fix: fill in [project] metadata with setuptools package discovery and dev deps for both projects, and add unit tests under tests/unit/ that exercise the core logic described in each README.
